title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Realm of the Gods

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... I got closer... to my friend... So much closer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I've never been this fast before... For a moment...
The view was...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If I'd run at that speed on the last stretch, I
would've...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant... This... still isn't enough...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Nothing is beyond me... Even if it means
abandoning everything I have, I'll push on ahead,
even further...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's because she was there... Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I have to bring as much passion as she does...
Next time, I'll try even harder...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Whoa ho ho... See that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: She made it! She almost made it... She was just a step away... but she's finally done it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is yelling out as she leaps over the
fence to join Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe, spare no details! What did you see? Far off
in the distance, what was there?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The moment you reached top speed, your
expression changed ever so slightly. What in the
world happened?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: In that moment...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I saw a light in the distance... One I'd never seen
before...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A light?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's the world we live in right now... But that
distant light...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It felt like something from another world. A light
that... only my friend knows.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I felt that if I touched that light, everything would
change. Illusions wouldn't be illusions anymore...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And I would understand everything... Even the
meaning behind my birth as an Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The meaning... behind your birth as an
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Such a frontier... actually...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see now! I finally understand now, after all this
time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This is the result! You're finally going to reach that frontier, just as I planned!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good, this is good! This is really good! Anyone
could have managed it. You, anyone!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This has to be a good thing! You did it... It was you! Yes... You!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But... I see... So it was you, then. You... Only you... can go beyond!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Only you? Only... you. Just... you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Oh. Ahhh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: AAAAARGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's uncharacteristic scream
suddenly pierces the atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Damn it, damn it, damn it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Be happy... Be happy about it! Just be satisfied! Be SATISFIED!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Am I not happy? I'll just keep going further and
set new targets!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But still... Will I never see it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's fine that it's Cafe! Anyone would've been fine! I would've been! But...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Am I the only one who can't? ...Wuhhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just an urge. A yearning for something. But the
tone of her voice... I feel like I've heard it before
somewhere.
WUHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It felt like it came from her friend... A voice
without a voice.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Has it... already been decided?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Results are immutable... I suppose they can't be
overruled...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: No, no, no no no!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: If only I had this new key!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, um...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me. I have... some matters to attend to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I didn't plan for this... I didn't...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Agnes Tachyon leaves. Watching
her walk away, I realize I've never seen her so
shaken.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, about my race against Silence Suzuka
today...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I feel as if it meant something. It's the same as
when I ran against Special Week...
choice_data_list: You think this race, too, is... guiding you?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. We canceled our plans to go abroad, and
yet, my friend was in front of her today...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka... There was something about
running with her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What if there was some kind of fateful reason
behind their race? If there was, then...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Actually, that reminds me of something T.M.
Opera O said.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She just came out with it... but it's left an
impression on me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera said I was the companion of
Leckermaul.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's how she described me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
A companion is someone who accompanies
another, isn't it? So is she talking about my...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That word implies some kind of karmic
connection. But then, maybe it was said without
any real thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Putting conjecture aside for now, I steer the
conversation back to her friend. If she's still
around, she must still want to guide Manhattan
Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We couldn't compete abroad, but it doesn't look
like we have to give up on our dream...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running internationally... While thinking it over,
an idea comes to me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So, for our next goal...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The Japan Cup...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'd be competing in the Japan Cup instead of
competing internationally, of course. But there's
no need to point that out.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer... That'll be our France, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we set our sights on the Japan Cup.
